creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Exp-run results on 91amd64 are available at:
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=91amd64-default-PR193691&build=2014-09-16_23h59m38s
Exp-run results on 10amd64 are available at:
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=10amd64-default-PR193691&build=2014-09-18_14h37m30s

There was 1 new failure,  but it seems due to WITH_NEW_XORG and not to new cmake:

+ {"origin"=>"games/el", "pkgname"=>"el-193_3", "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"???"}

Failure log:
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/91amd64-default-PR193691/2014-09-16_23h59m38s/logs/errors/el-193_3.log
